summary: Validate the R1 authoritative client runtime exit gate
acceptance_criteria: Normal Web and Electron paths are inspected against the R0 audit and contain no fixture, local-success, void command, prefab-only, or test-only substitution for authoritative runtime behavior.
Production Worker boot, shutdown, reconnect, crash recovery, Command, Query, Preview, Submit, Read Model Delta, SetSpeed, Save, and Load are evidenced end to end.
No browser main-thread, React, renderer, Redux/client store, Electron main, or preload path directly mutates WorldState or calls sim-core authority APIs.
Legal command acceptance changes the authoritative hash; invalid, stale, duplicate, and expired commands preserve it and expose stable rejection reasons that drive UI state.

Pause, 1x, 2x, 4x, deterministic auto-pause, one-month settlement, save/fresh-restart/load, Worker crash recovery, Web/Electron save parity, and browser/Node deterministic parity all pass with real runtime evidence.
Storybook, Playwright, Node, canary, fixture, and production evidence remain separately classified, and Playwright exercises a real production Worker.
R1 has no open P0 or P1 defect, all R4 implementation tasks have their required independent reviews, and unresolved lower-severity risks are explicitly bounded before recommending PASS.
The gate returns only PASS, REQUEST_CHANGES, or BLOCK and does not mark itself ACCEPTED/CLOSED or start R2 without Lead and QA completion.
required_tests: node .agents/skills/monsoon-studio-orchestrator/scripts/taskctl.mjs validate for all eight RR1 tasks
JSON parse, handoff validation, git diff --check, forbidden-path proof, required-review proof, and production runtime evidence audit
notes: This task is an evidence and Gate task only; product defects must be routed to the owning RR1 implementation task.
The accepted forward authority remains docs/29-product-recovery-roadmap.md.
R2 task creation remains frozen until R1 Gate acceptance and Lead closure.
